data.description: ZELENSKYY SAID A US SECURITY GUARANTEES AGREEMENT FOR UKRAINE IS FULLY READY FOR SIGNING, WITH TALKS SET TO RESUME IN THE UAE AS KYIV PUSHES FOR EU MEMBERSHIP BY 2027 AMID ONGOING NEGOTIATIONS TO END THE WAR WITH RUSSIA.
TOYOTA MOTOR SHARES UNTRADED DUE TO HEAVY SELL ORDERS
SOUTH KOREAN WON OPENS STRONGER AT 1,446.1 PER DOLLAR VS 1,462.5 PREVIOUS CLOSE

data.title: Art lawyer's platform, Lloyds Auctions, secures $1B+ in art listings in first month - set for rapid growth.
data.description: On January 1, 2026, a visionary entertainment and creative arts attorney launched the innovative online art auction platform, Lloyds Auctions, in Dubai, UAE, Sydney, and New Delhi. Within just a few weeks, the platform has already amassed an impressive $1 billion in committed art listings.

data.title: Argo Biopharma begins Phase 2b trial of siRNA therapeutic BW-20829 for patients with Elevated Lp(a).
data.description: On January 25, 2026, Argo Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. commenced a global Phase 2b clinical trial by dosing the first patient. The company, based in both Shanghai and Boston, specializes in developing advanced siRNA therapies. This milestone marks a significant step forward in their commitment to innovation in the field of biotechnology.

data.title: FDA accepts first quality control protocol for Mesenchymal Stromal Cells; sets new therapeutic standard. (Characters: 108)
data.description: In an unprecedented development in the cell therapy sector, a Device Master File (DMF) outlining the pioneering quality control standard for Mesenchymal Stromal Cells (MSCs) has been approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This milestone achievement emerged from TIANJIN, China, on January 25, 2026. This crucial step sets a significant precedent for the industry, as it marks the initial establishment of a defined quality benchmark for MSCs in medical applications. This move emphasizes the increasing focus on standards and regulations to ensure the effectiveness and safety of cellular therapies.

data.title: Domino's Pizza China opens 1,405th store in Sanya, matching HKEX stock ticker.
data.description: On January 25, 2026, Domino's Pizza China ("DPC Dash") unveiled its 1,405th store in Sanya. Acting as the main franchisee for Domino's Pizza in Chinese Mainland, Hong Kong SAR, and Macau SAR, the Company continues to expand its reach.

data.title: Hivemind Capital partners with CPIC IMHK to launch $500M Real-World Asset Tokenization Fund in HK.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 25, 2026, Hivemind Capital, a prominent investment group specializing in traditional markets and the onchain economy, revealed a new partnership with CPIC Investment Management (H.K.) Co, Ltd ("CPIC IMHK"). CPIC IMHK, a subsidiary of a major organization, will collaborate strategically with Hivemind Capital.
MALAYSIAN RINGGIT GAINS TO STRONGEST SINCE 2018 AGAINST DOLLAR

data.title: FDA to review LEQEMBI IQLIK application for Alzheimer's treatment; potential first at-home injection option for early stages.
data.description: If given the green light, LEQEMBI IQLIK could become the initial and sole anti-amyloid remedy providing the choice of at-home injections for starting and maintaining doses for combating this advancing and persistent illness.

data.title: FDA accepts LEQEMBI® IQLIKTM supplemental application for Alzheimer's with at-home injections, decision on May 24, 2026.
data.description: LEQEMBI IQLIK, if authorized, will become the initial and sole anti-amyloid remedy providing the possibility of at-home injections for both starting and upkeep doses for the condition, which progresses continuously. The FDA is scheduled to make a decision on this by May 24, 2026. This significant development is a joint effort between Tokyo and Cambridge, Massachusetts, announced on January 25, 2026.

data.title: General Mills expands voluntary recall of select Pillsbury Pizza Pops products in Toronto on December 21, 2025.
data.description: General Mills has expanded its voluntary recall of select Pillsbury Pizza Pops products on December 21, 2025, in Toronto. The recall includes a specific range of products due to potential contamination concerns. Customers are advised to check the affected products, as outlined in the recall notice, and return them for a full refund if purchased. This recall aims to ensure the safety and well-being of consumers, and any inquiries regarding the recalled products can be directed to the company's customer service line.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop due to Trump's 100% Canada tariff threat, gov shutdown risks, and impending earnings reports from Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, and Apple.
data.description: President Donald Trump has issued a warning of imposing a full 100% tariff on imports from Canada. With this threat in place, concerns about a potential government shutdown have increased significantly. Major companies such as Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, and Apple are awaiting their upcoming earnings reports, which are expected to have a significant impact on the market. The Dow Jones Futures have experienced a decline in response to these developments, highlighting the focus on Trump's tariff threats, the risk of a government shutdown, and the impending corporate earnings releases.

data.title: A*STAR and Halliburton collaborate to launch NEX Lab to advance well completion innovations for energy industry.
data.description: In a joint effort, Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) and Singapore’s leading R&D agency, A*STAR, have introduced the Next-Generation Energy Accelerators Joint Lab (NEX Lab℠) to drive the advancement and adoption of cutting-edge well completion technologies within the energy sector. The initiative, also backed by the Singapore Economic Development Board, seeks to hasten the development and market entry of these technologies.

data.title: European business leader optimism drops as 96% believe Europe needs to protect commercial interests. 85% citizens agree.
data.description: A recent survey revealed that there is a growing concern among Europeans regarding the need for a reinvention of the continent. A staggering 96% of business leaders emphasized the urgency for Europe to safeguard its commercial interests to avert severe repercussions. This sentiment is echoed by 85% of citizens, indicating a strong consensus on the issue. Furthermore, the data suggests that business confidence is on the decline, showcasing the pressing need for action within the European market.

data.title: Fox News predominantly backs official account of Minneapolis shooting, emphasizing that protester Alex Pretti instigated violence.
data.description: Fox News anchors were heavily emphasizing the Trump administration's stance that the deceased protester, Alex Pretti, was responsible for the violence.

data.title: 2026 Boswick Burn & Wound Symposium showcases AVITA Medical’s technologies: RECELL, PermeaDerm, and Cohealyx for acute wound care.
data.description: New findings presented at the 2026 Boswick Burn & Wound Symposium showcased AVITA Medical's technologies, including RECELL, PermeaDerm, and Cohealyx, for acute wound care. The event featured data demonstrating the efficacy of these technologies, attracting attention from over 200 medical professionals and researchers. AVITA Medical's innovative solutions continue to make strides in improving treatment for acute wounds, with the Symposium serving as a platform to share their advancements in the field.
Company reports Q4 and full year 2025 results.

data.title: Duke Energy reports 18,000+ outages in Carolinas due to Winter Storm Fern, with more expected as ice threatens.
data.description: **Winter Storm Fern persists in bringing freezing rain and sleet across the Carolinas, resulting in damage to trees, limbs, and power lines. The storm hit Charlotte, NC on January 25, 2026, causing widespread impacts. Residents are advised to stay updated on the situation. For media resources, access the Duke Energy News Center.**

data.title: US Foundry hash rate decreases by 60% due to Winter Storm Fern, leaving 1M Americans without power.
data.description: A winter storm named Fern is moving through the United States, causing power outages for 1 million people.
